allow: Bash(curl -s -X OPTIONS https://www.btmusicdrive.com/api/orders -H 'Origin: https://www.btmusicdrive.com' -H 'Access-Control-Request-Method: GET' -H 'Access-Control-Request-Headers: x-admin-password' -v)
Bash(awk -F= '{ if\($2==""||$2=="\\"\\""\) print $1": EMPTY"; else print $1": set \("length\($2\)" chars\)" }')

Bash(python -c "import sys, json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); items=d.get\('data',d\) if isinstance\(d,dict\) else d; cats=set\(\); [cats.add\(\(p.get\('category'\) or {}\).get\('name'\) if isinstance\(p.get\('category'\),dict\) else p.get\('category'\)\) for p in items]; print\('Categories:', cats\); print\('Total:', len\(items\)\)")
